translation: Ferlos in Blaze fan syn stêf

translation: Fernietigje in Ghast mei in fjoerbal

source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
translation: Do moatst in promovearre spiler yn kreative modus wêze

source_string: Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Opdrachtblokken binne net ynskeakele op dizze server
Brûk ‘@r’ om samar in spiler út te sykjen
Brûk ‘@s’ om op it útfierende entiteit te rochtsjen

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Pas op! Asto in boek sinjearrest, kinsto it net mear bewurkje.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Bisto wis datsto de folgjende website iepenje wolst?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Wolsto dizze keppeling iepenje of it kopiearje nei dyn klamboerd?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Iepenje nea keppelingen fan minsken dy'tsto net fertroust!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Foar oanpaste baasbalke %s binne gjin spilers online

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Neat wizige, omdat dizze spiler al gjin behearder is

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: Tichtsby %s befynt harren op %s (%s blokken ôfstân)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: Tichtsby %s befynt harren op %s (%s blokken ôfstân)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Neat wizige, omdat dizze spiler al behearder is

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard
Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Doel hat al dy eigenskip of hat der tefolle

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server
translation: It ferbinen mei server is mislearre
Dit sil dyn aktuele ynstellingen oer-
skriuwe en kin net ûngedien makke wurde.
Ekstra avansearre ynstellingen (allinnich foar betûfte brûkers!)

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Dêrtsjinoer binne hjir in pear dy't wy sels makke hawwe!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Wolsto dyn sjabloan mei ien diele? Brûk it fek hjirûnder!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
translation: %1$s is plette troch in fallend ambyld

source_string: %1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s is yn in kaktus rûn besykjend %2$s te ûntflechten
%1$s is krekt wat te hurd lâne

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block
translation: %1$s is troch in fallend blok plette
%1$s is mei in fjoerbal troch %2$s deamakke
%1$s is mei in fjoerbal mei in %3$s troch %2$s deamakke

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s besocht yn lava te swimmen om %2$s te ûntflechten

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s

translation: %1$s is probearjend %2$s sear te dwaan ferstoarn

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
translation: %1$s waard spitse troch in fallende stalaktyt
%1$s is fan in heech plak fallen

source_string: %1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s wie doeme te fallen troch %2$s mei in %3$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s foel te fier en waard ôfmakke troch %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s foel te fier en waard ôfmakke troch %2$s mei in %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Dizze demo duorret fiif dagen (yn it spul). Doch dyn bêst!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Dyn fiifde dei is foarby. Brûk %s om in skermôfbylding fan dyn kreaasje te meitsjen.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Dizze demo duorret fiif dagen yn it spultsje (likernôch 1 oer en 40 minuten yn wurklike tiid). Sjoch by de prestaasjes foar hints! In soad nocht!
Brûk %1$s om dyn ynventaris te iepenjen

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Brûk %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s en de mûs om rûn te rinnen
Sjoch om dy hinne mei de mûs

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Dyn demotiid is oer. Keapje it spul om fierder te spyljen of begjin in nije wrâld!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Bisto wis datsto it wrâldnivo beskoattelje wolst? Dit set dyn wrâld fêst op %1$s, en dat silsto nea wer tebeksette kinne.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Unjildige sesje (probearje dyn spul opnij te starten)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: De ferifikaasjeservers binne op dit stuit net berikber. Besykje it letter nochris.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Bisto wis datsto dizze server fuortsmite wolst?
Klik om fek út te skeakeljen

context: How To Play help text header. {MaxLength="80"}

translation: Druk op :_input_key.sneak: om ôf te stappen.

translation: Siket nei spultsjes op dyn lokale netwurk
Bewarje en tebek nei de titel
Doarpelingen folje harren foarried oant twa kear deis oan.

source_string: This server recommends the use of a custom resource pack.
translation: Dizze server rekommandearret oan om in spesjaal boarnepakket te brûken.

source_string: Would you like to download and install it automagically?
translation: Wolsto it automagysk downloade en ynstallearje?
